tickets.subject: Login button unresponsive
tickets.body: The login button on the main page doesn't respond when clicked. I've tried Chrome and Firefox.

tickets.subject: App crashes on startup
tickets.body: Every time I open the application it crashes immediately. I have reinstalled it twice with no change.

tickets.subject: Export to PDF not working
tickets.body: When I click 'Export to PDF', nothing happens. The download never starts. Other exports work fine.

tickets.subject: Dashboard loading very slowly
tickets.body: The dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load. It used to be instant. Nothing changed on my end.

tickets.subject: Notifications not appearing
tickets.body: I stopped receiving in-app notifications two days ago. My settings are correct and unchanged.

tickets.subject: Search returns no results
tickets.body: The search bar shows zero results for any query, even for items I can see in the list.

tickets.subject: Tracking number not updating
tickets.body: My tracking number has shown 'label created' for 5 days. The package does not seem to have moved.

tickets.subject: Wrong delivery address on order
tickets.body: I noticed I entered the wrong address after placing the order. Can this be corrected before dispatch?

tickets.subject: Package marked delivered but not received
tickets.body: The tracking says my package was delivered yesterday but I have not received it. No delivery note left either.

tickets.subject: Shipping delay — urgent
tickets.body: My order was due 4 days ago and still hasn't arrived. I need it for a presentation next week.

tickets.subject: Estimated delivery keeps changing
tickets.body: The estimated delivery date has changed three times in 2 days. I need a reliable date.

tickets.subject: Delivered to wrong address
tickets.body: The courier left my parcel at a neighbour's address without informing me. I need help recovering it.

tickets.subject: How do I reset my password?
tickets.body: I forgot my password and the reset email is not arriving, even after several attempts.

tickets.subject: What are your support hours?
tickets.body: I'd like to know when your customer support team is available by phone.

tickets.subject: Is the software compatible with macOS 14?
tickets.body: The website only mentions Windows compatibility. Does your software run on macOS 14?

tickets.subject: How do I upgrade my subscription?
tickets.body: I'd like to upgrade from the basic to the pro plan. I cannot find the option in settings.

tickets.subject: Can I transfer my account to another email?
tickets.body: I changed my company email address and would like to move my account to the new one.

tickets.subject: Looking for the user manual
tickets.body: I cannot find a downloadable user manual or documentation on the website. Could you send it?

tickets.subject: Invoice amount incorrect
tickets.body: The invoice I received shows €240 but I should only be charged €120 for the basic plan.

tickets.subject: Charged twice this month
tickets.body: My bank statement shows two identical charges for my subscription this month. Please refund one.

tickets.subject: VAT number missing from invoice
tickets.body: My company requires the VAT number on invoices for tax purposes. Can you re-issue the latest one?

tickets.subject: Payment failed but bank was charged
tickets.body: The checkout said my payment failed, but I can see the charge on my credit card statement.

tickets.subject: Annual leave request
tickets.body: I'd like to request 2 weeks of annual leave starting August 12th. Please confirm whether this is possible.

tickets.subject: Salary discrepancy on last paycheck
tickets.body: My last paycheck was €200 less than expected. Could HR look into this as soon as possible?

tickets.subject: Remote work policy question
tickets.body: I would like to work from abroad for 6 weeks this summer. What does company policy say about this?

tickets.subject: Contract extension inquiry
tickets.body: My current contract ends in 3 months. I'm interested in discussing a potential extension.

tickets.subject: Defective item — want to return
tickets.body: The laptop I received has a cracked screen straight out of the box. I'd like to return it for a replacement.

tickets.subject: Wrong colour delivered
tickets.body: I ordered the blue model but received a red one. I'd like the correct item sent and a return label.

tickets.subject: No refund after 10 days
tickets.body: I sent my return 10 days ago and have not received a confirmation or refund. Please advise.

tickets.subject: Item damaged in transit
tickets.body: The package arrived visibly damaged. The item inside is broken and completely unusable.
